title: A Resolution Approving the Sangguniang Kabataan Annual Budget of Barangay Tuntungin-putho, Los Baños, Laguna for the Year 2022 in the Amount of One Million Two Hundred Forty One Thousand Six Hundred Twenty Four Pesos and 10/100 Only (1,241,624.10). (AUTHOR: JONATHAN BRYAN S. SIYTIAP, 8/08/2022)
